title: drynaria hieronymi
intro: Drynaria hieronymi, also known as the Chinese tuckahoe or tuckahoe fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Drynaria hieronymi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and powder, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional Chinese medicine.
